This [Colombia](/wiki/Colombia "Colombia")-related article is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Poblado_station&action=edit).

is a station on line A of the [Medellín Metro](/wiki/Medell%C3%ADn_Metro "Medellín Metro") from north to south. It is named after [El Poblado](/wiki/El_Poblado_(Medell%C3%ADn) "El Poblado (Medellín)"), where it is located adjacent to the Monterrey shopping center.[[1]](#cite_note-A.2001-1) The station was opened on 30 November 1995 as the terminus of the inaugural section of Line A, from [Niquía](/wiki/Niqu%C3%ADa_station "Niquía station") to Poblado. On 30 September 1996 the line was extended to [Itagüí](/wiki/Itag%C3%BC%C3%AD_station "Itagüí station").[[2]](#cite_note-urbanrail-2)

Peralta Agudelo Peralta A. (2001). [*Los paisajes que han tejido nuestra historia: evolución histórica del entorno ambiental y social de El Poblado*](https://books.google.com/books?id=IM9usNGtqFUC&pg=PA41). Universidad Eafit. p. 41. [ISBN](/wiki/ISBN_(identifier) "ISBN (identifier)") [978-958-9041-78-9](/wiki/Special:BookSources/978-958-9041-78-9 "Special:BookSources/978-958-9041-78-9").

**Poblado** is a station on line A of the [Medellín Metro](/wiki/Medell%C3%ADn_Metro "Medellín Metro") from north to south. It is named after [El Poblado](/wiki/El_Poblado_(Medell%C3%ADn) "El Poblado (Medellín)"), where it is located adjacent to the Monterrey shopping center.[[1]](#cite_note-A.2001-1) The station was opened on 30 November 1995 as the terminus of the inaugural section of Line A, from [Niquía](/wiki/Niqu%C3%ADa_station "Niquía station") to Poblado. On 30 September 1996 the line was extended to [Itagüí](/wiki/Itag%C3%BC%C3%AD_station "Itagüí station").[[2]](#cite_note-urbanrail-2)

[ISBN](/wiki/ISBN_(identifier) "ISBN (identifier)") [978-958-9041-78-9](/wiki/Special:BookSources/978-958-9041-78-9 "Special:BookSources/978-958-9041-78-9").
